qa_pairs.question: What is the opposite of "Always coming from take me down"?
What important procedure might involve a 5th female or a 95th male?
qa_pairs.answer: Crash testing using anthropomorphic test devices (crash test dummies) representing the 5th-percentile female and 95th-percentile male.

qa_pairs.question: The Lotus Super 7 was a 'kit car' where the customers were supplied with a book of instructions and all the parts they needed to make it themselves. However, even kit cars can attract taxes when they're exported. So what did Lotus do that allowed buyers to avoid this tax?
qa_pairs.answer: They supplied disassembly instructions, so buyers had to follow them in reverse to assemble the car.

qa_pairs.question: "Your dog seems to take interest in the TV programme you're watching," says Mandy. "Yes, he's become a lot smarter than when he was a puppy," replies Priya. Mandy shakes her head. "That's nothing to do with it." Why?
qa_pairs.answer: Because newer TVs have higher refresh rates, so the dog can now perceive the image instead of seeing flicker.

qa_pairs.question: The American rapper Watsky released his album COMPLAINT in 2019. The entire cover consisted of the title in the largest letters possible. Why were his follow-up albums called PLACEMENT and INTENTION?
qa_pairs.answer: Because the three album covers fit together as a three-piece design: COMPLAINT, PLACEMENT, and INTENTION interlock in a 3x3 arrangement.

qa_pairs.question: Normally, if you leave your car in a business's parking lot overnight without prior arrangement, you might expect it to be towed, clamped, or ticketed. However, Jake returned to his car the morning after his visit to find he had been given a $5 reward. Why?
qa_pairs.answer: He had left his car overnight at a bar instead of driving drunk, and the bar rewarded him for being responsible.

qa_pairs.question: On the few occasions she has to fly, Eve always tries to reduce her carbon emissions. When booking a flight between Seoul and Buenos Aires, she chooses the cheapest one-stop flight from various route options without careful examination. What was different about this journey?
qa_pairs.answer: Seoul and Buenos Aires are roughly opposite each other on the globe, so any one-stop route between them is the shortest possible distance.
